subject: Fermi GBM trigger 488128598/160620637 is not a GRB
body:
M. Stanbro (UAH) and R. Hamburg (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM
Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 488128598/160620637
at 15:16:34.88 UT on 20 June 2016, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to a SGR."
